corrected_fields.summary: This is a Treasury.gov landing page that describes the existence and release schedules of three Treasury reporting mechanisms: the Daily Treasury Statement (DTS), the Monthly Treasury Statement of Receipts and Outlays (MTS), and the Monthly Statement of the Public Debt (MSPD). No specific data, forecasts, or policy decisions are contained in this page.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page describes Treasury reporting infrastructure but contains no actionable data. It is a navigation/description page for understanding what Treasury reports exist and when they are released, rather than the reports themselves. It has no direct market-moving information.
corrected_fields.market_structure_context: The page describes Treasury cash management operations and reporting structure, including where Treasury maintains operating cash (FRBNY account and Tax and Loan accounts at commercial banks). This represents institutional market plumbing information but the page itself does not contain specific operational data.
